mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_info_gap_vote ( user_id, info_gap_id, type, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{infoGapId}, #{type}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, info_gap_id as infoGapId, type FROM osh_info_gap_vote WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND info_gap_id = #{infoId} LIMIT 1
